event_description: A Safe Walkway Violation is detected when a person's position in the video frame places them beyond the green walkway boundaries and into an area designated for machinery or vehicle operation.
The color of the safety vest worn by a person interacting with equipment is the primary observable criterion for classifying the behavior as Authorized or Unauthorized Intervention.
An Opened Panel Cover is detected when the surveillance system observes a panel in the open -cover state during production operations. No personnel nearby at the sampled time.
The number of blocks visible on the forklift forks during travel is the observable criterion used by the automated detection system to classify the load as safe or overloaded.
